sqlMap.select: SELECT rt.* FROM p_reality_show_t rt WHERE rt.validflag =2 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.datalabel= $datalabel$
SELECT COUNT(rt.id) FROM p_reality_show_t rt WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.datalabel= $datalabel$
SELECT rt.* FROM p_reality_show_t rt WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.datalabel= $datalabel$ ORDER BY rt.id desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_reality_show_t (personnelid,datalabel, lifepattern,healthstate, characteristic,lifehabit, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$datalabel$, '$lifepattern$','$healthstate$', '$characteristic$','$lifehabit$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_reality_show_t SET validflag=$validflag$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT rt.* FROM zfw_p_reality_show_t rt WHERE rt.validflag =2 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.datalabel= $datalabel$
SELECT COUNT(rt.id) FROM zfw_p_reality_show_t rt WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.datalabel= $datalabel$
SELECT rt.* FROM zfw_p_reality_show_t rt WHERE rt.validflag >0 AND rt.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND rt.datalabel= $datalabel$ ORDER BY rt.id desc
